label: Santa Maria del Sasso Church
description: The images feature the historic stone bell tower and roof of the Church of Santa Maria del Sasso in Morcote, overlooking Lake Lugano. This iconic landmark is captured from an elevated perspective with the lake and mountains in the background.
search_prompt: stone bell tower with a green dome and church roof overlooking a large lake and mountains

label: Morcote village and Church
description: A picturesque view of the lakeside village of Morcote featuring the Church of Santa Maria del Sasso and its prominent bell tower on a lush hillside.
search_prompt: lakeside village with colorful buildings and a stone church with a tall bell tower on a green hillside

label: Swing the World Morcote
description: A scenic wooden swing decorated with flowers that overlooks Lake Lugano and the historic bell tower of the Santa Maria del Sasso church in Morcote.
search_prompt: wooden swing with flower garlands overlooking a lake and a church tower with a green dome

label: Narrow stepped alleys of Gandria
description: Historic, extremely narrow pedestrian lanes featuring steep stone staircases and tall buildings, characteristic of the lakeside village of Gandria near Lugano.
search_prompt: narrow stepped stone alleyway with tall historic buildings in Gandria Switzerland

label: Festive Holiday Meal Collages
description: A collection of digital collages showcasing elaborate home-cooked festive meals, featuring roast turkey, roast chicken, and seasonal desserts decorated for holidays like Thanksgiving and Mother's Day.
search_prompt: festive dining table with roast poultry, decorated desserts, and holiday-themed table settings

label: Panoramic view from Morcote
description: A scenic high-angle vista overlooking the red-tiled roofs of Morcote village and the expansive waters of Lake Lugano, framed by lush terraced slopes and mountains.
search_prompt: scenic viewpoint of Morcote village red roofs and Lake Lugano with terraced hillsides

label: Lake Gate of Parco Ciani
description: An iconic lakeside gate with two ornate stone pillars overlooking Lake Lugano, famously captured through a framing stone archway. It is a signature landmark within the Parco Ciani public park in Lugano.
search_prompt: a view of Lake Lugano through a stone archway featuring two ornate stone gateposts on the water's edge

label: Roman Fountain and semicircular colonnade
description: A neoclassical stone colonnade with a curved architrave and a matching bench overlooking Lake Lugano, situated near the Fontana Romana.
search_prompt: neoclassical semicircular stone colonnade with columns and a stone bench overlooking a lake

label: Morcote lakeside promenade
description: The scenic Lungolago in the village of Morcote, featuring small motorboats moored to white poles along the stone embankment of Lake Lugano.
search_prompt: lakeside promenade with small boats moored to white poles next to a stone embankment and mountains in the background

label: White fluffy Bichon Frise dog
description: A small white dog with curly fur is featured in every photo, seen sitting on various park benches and outdoors near Lake Lugano.
search_prompt: small white fluffy dog with curly hair and black eyes and nose

label: San Lorenzo Cathedral bell tower
description: A stone staircase lined with tall cypress trees leading towards the distinctive bell tower of the San Lorenzo Cathedral in Lugano.
search_prompt: stone staircase lined with cypress trees and a tall stone bell tower with a green dome in the background

label: Grand Tour Switzerland photo frame
description: A large red shield-shaped photo spot frame on a wooden pier in Morcote, part of the Grand Tour of Switzerland. It is used by tourists to frame scenic views of Lake Lugano and the surrounding mountains.
search_prompt: red shield-shaped photo frame with 'Grand Tour of Switzerland' and 'Morcote' text on a lakeside pier

label: Scenic view of Lake Lugano
description: The images depict various tourists posing at scenic overlooks within Parco Ciani, featuring panoramic views of Lake Lugano and the surrounding mountains.
search_prompt: panoramic view of Lake Lugano with mountains and Mediterranean park vegetation

label: Blooming purple wisteria vines
description: Cascading purple wisteria flowers decorating traditional stone buildings and balconies overlooking Lake Lugano.
search_prompt: hanging clusters of purple wisteria flowers on a building facade with stone walls

label: Morcote lakeside village promenade
description: The images show the iconic waterfront of Morcote on Lake Lugano, featuring a line of stone pines and historic buildings with arcades. This scenic view is a classic landmark of the Ticino region in Switzerland.
search_prompt: lakeside promenade with stone pine trees and arcaded buildings

label: Interior of San Rocco Church
description: The ornate interior and main altar of the Chiesa di San Rocco, featuring a distinctive red drapery and baroque architecture. It is located at the edge of Parco Ciani in Lugano.
search_prompt: interior of a baroque church with a prominent red drape behind a marble altar and chandeliers

label: Decorative wooden wine barrels
description: Large wooden wine barrels repurposed as outdoor tables or decorative displays in front of shops and restaurants.
search_prompt: wooden wine barrel with metal hoops used as outdoor furniture

label: Historic village of Gandria
description: Traditional stone buildings with arched windows and red-tiled roofs overlooking Lake Lugano from a hillside cobblestone path.
search_prompt: historic stone house with arched windows and red tile roof on a cobblestone path overlooking a lake with mountains

label: Lakeside promenade in Parco Ciani
description: A wooden boardwalk running along Lake Lugano, featuring decorative metal arches and floral planters on the railings.
search_prompt: wooden lakeside boardwalk with metal arches and flower boxes

label: Road bikes by Lake Lugano
description: Modern road bicycles posed along the scenic waterfront promenade of Lake Lugano, featuring the calm water and alpine mountains in the background.
search_prompt: a road bicycle parked on a lakeside promenade with mountain scenery in the background

label: Wedding couples in Parco Ciani
description: These images depict various couples and individuals in formal wedding attire posing for professional portraits within a park setting. The subjects are consistently brides in white gowns and grooms in suits, often holding floral bouquets.
search_prompt: wedding couple bride in white dress and groom in suit posing outdoors

label: Monte San Salvatore
description: The distinctive conical mountain rising above the blue waters of Lake Lugano, a signature landmark of the region.
search_prompt: a prominent conical mountain peak overlooking a large blue lake under a cloudy sky
